zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Turnham於1192年出生在英國史洛普爾格亞特 安德 蕾托 貝維其可時，她的父親Stephen de Thornham28歲，母親Edeline de Broc27歲。她於1219年之前與Roger de Leybourne Lord of Berwick結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1220年在英國享年28歲。

nameMeanings.name: Turnham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Buckinghamshire and Middlesex): habitational name, primarily from Turnham Green in Chiswick (Greater London), but occasionally also from Turnham Hall in Cliffe (Yorkshire). The placenames probably derive from Old English trun, turn ‘circular, round’, possibly also ‘bend (in a river)’, + hām ‘village, homestead’ or hamm ‘enclosure, water meadow’.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Turnham was born in 1192, in Great and Little Berwick, Shropshire, England, her father, Stephen de Thornham, was 28 and her mother, Edeline de Broc, was 27. She married Roger de Leybourne Lord of Berwick before 1219. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1220, in England, at the age of 28.

Elle a épousé Roger de Leybourne Lord of Berwick avant 1219. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1220, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 28 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Turnham(이)가 1192년 영국 슈럽실르 그리트 앤드 리틀 버윅에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Stephen de Thornham(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Edeline de Broc(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1219년 이전 Roger de Leybourne Lord of Berwick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1220년 영국에서 28세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Turnham родилась в 1192 г. в местности грит анд литл бирвикк, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Stephen de Thornham было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Edeline de Broc, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de Leybourne Lord of Berwick перед 1219 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1220 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 28 лет.
